name: Losartan 50mg
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
uses: Stroke prevention in hypertension with LVH
how_it_works: Angiotensin II receptor blocker (ARB) that blocks AT1 receptors, reducing vasoconstriction and aldosterone secretion, lowering blood pressure.
food_interactions: Potassium-rich foods (bananas, coconut water) may worsen hyperkalemia
what_to_avoid: Avoid potassium supplements without doctor approval
